title: Excel Node not loading workbooks from OneDrive
symptom: When trying to select a workbook in the Excel node, it shows 'No results' despite files being present in OneDrive.
not_this_if: Using the 'By ID' method to access workbooks
root_cause: The Excel node may have issues loading workbook files directly from OneDrive due to how the API interacts with file identifiers. The node requires a specific Graph DriveItem ID to access the workbook correctly.
fix_steps: Obtain the Microsoft Graph DriveItem ID for the desired workbook.
Use the 'By ID' option in the Excel node to access the workbook using this ID.
agent_instruction: Use the Microsoft Graph DriveItem ID to access the workbook in the Excel node.
